measures.title: Replacement Educational Programs and Operations Levy
measures.what_it_does: Replaces the expiring educational programs and operations levy, $950,000 per year for 2027 through 2030.
measures.cost_line: Estimated $1.24 declining to $1.02 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.jurisdiction: Skagit County Public Hospital District No. 304 (United General)
measures.title: Levy Lid Lift
measures.what_it_does: Lifts the hospital district's regular levy lid for 2027 collection.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.jurisdiction: Skagit County Fire Protection District No. 8
measures.title: Levy Restoration
measures.what_it_does: Restores the fire district's regular levy with a 103% limit factor for five years.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.
